query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A pocket watch with a chain rests among voluminous white textures in a pale grayscale scene. The circular face and metallic edges of the timepiece are visible, while the surrounding material forms soft, rounded shapes around it.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A pocket watch with a chain rests among voluminous white textures, rendered with intentional soft-focus blur and extreme overexposure that blows out highlights into a pale haze. The muted, washed-out grayscale palette and lack of sharp detail create an ethereal, dreamlike atmosphere.
